study_title: Transcriptomic signatures of mating and sham-mating in mature ant queens
exp_title: RNAseq of Cardiocondyla obscurior queens mated with fertile male
sample_description: Cardiocondyla obscurior queen mated with fertile male

exp_title: Cardiocondyla obscurior winged male larvae RNAseq SE 100 bp
design: Whole RNA was extracted from individual whole-body early third instar winged male larvae. Sequencing libraries were generated with the Ovation RNAseq system V2 (NuGEN) and the Encore Rapid DR Multiplex system (NuGEN).
